summary_text: - **High (finding):** Both target Notion-tied rows are live in Notion-sync queue at `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json#L240-L257` (ID `3376b8c0-f0ac-8126-99e4-f4326a076d01`) and `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json#L360-L376` (ID `3376b8c0-f0ac-8171-9ea1-e8bb62443cab`), with `status: "draft"`, `source_url`, `thumbnail_qa_verified: true`, `thumbnail_gate2_pass: true`, and `thumbnail_image_present: true`. - **High (finding):** For both rows, publish-facing text is in `text` (Notion `Body` mapping), and the extracted opener lines contain no obvious person/company/product names in the live field values: `『AIに臨床の魂は本当に宿るのか』…` and `『goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い』`. - **Medium (risk):** Non-commercial/proper-noun control can only be partially confirmed from queue text; both rows still carry external URLs in `source_url` (`note.com` / `x.com`) at `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json#L254-L255` and `#L374-L375`, which is consistent with source-link handling but should continue to stay source-only by policy. - **Medium (risk):** Thumbnail visual style compliance (`bold`, `text-heavy`, easy-to-understand) is not directly guaranteed by metadata. Metadata passes (`thumbnail_qa_verified`/`gate2`), and assets exist at: - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/3376b8c0f0ac812699e4f4326a076d01.png` - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/3376b8c0f0ac81719ea1e8bb62443cab.png` but `sips` only confirms dimensions `1280x670`; OCR probes returned short text snippets, so style/readability is only partially verifiable without a human visual pass. - **Medium (risk):** Both rows currently show `thumbnail_generator: "codex-abstract-repair"` in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json#L249-L252` and `#L369-L372`; x-auto guidance prefers Manus/NB2 and treats other generators as requiring explicit approval (policy mismatch risk). - **Low (context/risk):** Draft artifacts used for planning are not authoritative SSOT for these notion IDs (`notion_page_id: null` in `docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json` and `docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json`), while a backup file (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json.bak-20260404-noncommercial-fix`) contains older variants with commercial names; current requirement-check should rely on current `post_queue.json`.
